title: CacheStrategy
description: Strategy interface that decides how assets are fetched and cached. Implementations own the full pipeline: cache check (if applicable) → network fetch (if needed) → factory.process → factory.create → cache write (if applicable). The returned value is the fully constructed resource (post-AssetFactory.create), not the intermediate source. ExoJS ships CacheFirstStrategy (default) and NetworkOnlyStrategy; implement this interface to add custom policies such as network-first, stale-while-revalidate, or cache-only / offline-first.

paragraphs: Strategy interface that decides how assets are fetched and cached.

ExoJS ships CacheFirstStrategy (default) and NetworkOnlyStrategy; implement this interface to add custom policies such as network-first, stale-while-revalidate, or cache-only / offline-first.

members.name: resolve
members.signature: resolve(request: CacheRequest, stores: readonly CacheStore[]): Promise<unknown>
members.description: Resolves a single asset according to the strategy's caching policy and returns the fully constructed resource.
